title: Mudu Sutta
subtitle: Soft
author: Thanissaro Bhikkhu
contentHtml: "Just as, of all trees, the balsam is foremost in terms of softness and pliancy, in the same way I don't envision a single thing that, when developed & cultivated, is as soft & pliant as the mind. The mind, when developed & cultivated, is soft & pliant."
summary: A simile for a mind that's pliant.
